title: Probation - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Probation 2 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Juvenile Offenders Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF OREGON DEPARTMENT OF CORRECTIONS COUNTY CORRECTIONS INFORMATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information about community corrections including supervision, community-based sanctions, and services directed at offenders who have committed felony crimes and have been placed under supervision by the courts (probation), the Board of Parole and Post-Prison Supervision, or the local supervisory authority (parole/post-prison supervision). 3723 Fairview Industrial Drive SE 200 Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Not applicable Email (503) 945-9090 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON YOUTH AUTHORITY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The Oregon Youth Authority (OYA) is responsible for the supervision, management, and administration of youth correctional facilities, state juvenile parole and probation services, community out-of-home placements for youth in custody, and other functions related to state programs for juvenile justice. 530 Center Street NE Suite 500 Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Call for information Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 373-7205 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON DEPARTMENT OF CORRECTIONS COUNTY CORRECTIONS INFORMATION OREGON YOUTH AUTHORITY OREGON YOUTH AUTHORITY
